briefdescription.para: This function extracts the 3D information from the Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VSIF payload.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_3D_Info instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the 3D format from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiC_3D_Struct_Field type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the sampling method info from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Method type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the sampling position info from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Position type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function converts a XV_HdmiC_3D_Struct_Field type to a XVidC_3DFormat type.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to convert.

briefdescription.para: This function converts a XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Method type to a XVidC_3DSamplingMethod type.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to convert.

briefdescription.para: This function converts a XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Position type to a XVidC_3DSamplingPosition type.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to convert.

briefdescription.para: This function parses a HDMI Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Rx_Aux instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function parses a HDMI forum Vendor Specific InfoFrame (HF-VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Rx_Aux instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function parses a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Rx_Aux instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function generates a HDMI fourm Vendor Specific InfoFrame (HF-VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Tx_Aux instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during generation

briefdescription.para: This function generates a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Tx_Aux instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during generation

briefdescription.para: This function displays the contents of an XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Struct_Field.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the value to convert.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Method.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the value to convert.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Position.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the value to convert.
